Node.description: Plugin to configure an emulated router
Node.help: EmulatedRouterPlugin plugin configures a single connected interface on the Port CPU routing traffic from all the unconnected interfaces available on the port CPU, emulating the function of a router.

PropertyString.obsolete: IpV4V6Range list must be used instead. Represents ipType of the first element in IpV4V6Range list
PropertyString.name: ipType

PropertyString.obsolete: IpV4V6Range list must be used instead. Represents ipAddress of the first element in IpV4V6Range list
PropertyString.name: ipAddress
PropertyString.description: IP address of the router or the connected interface.

PropertyString.obsolete: IpV4V6Range list must be used instead. Represents incrementBy of the first element in IpV4V6Range list
PropertyString.name: incrementBy
PropertyString.description: Increment to determine the IP address of the router when the port group has more than one port.

PropertyString.obsolete: IpV4V6Range list must be used instead. Represents gatewayAddress of the first element in IpV4V6Range list
PropertyString.name: gatewayAddress

PropertyInt.obsolete: IpV4V6Range list must be used instead. Represents prefix of the first element in IpV4V6Range list
PropertyInt.name: prefix
PropertyInt.description: The subnet mask of the router.

PropertyNode.obsolete: IpV4V6Range list must be used instead. Represents vlan of the first element in IpV4V6Range list
PropertyNode.name: vlan
PropertyNode.help: Vlan information for the emulated router.

PropertyNodeList.name: rangeList
PropertyNodeList.help: List of IpV4V6Range. See IpV4V6Range for more details.
